allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix 14 bugs from full codebase audit

Critical:
- treeEval: guard featureIdx bounds before array access
- vwap: fix countVwapCrosses array alignment \(closes vs vwapSeries different lengths\)
- regime: guard vwap=0 division by zero
- arbitrage: use Number.isFinite\(\) to catch NaN/Infinity
- binanceWs/chainlinkWss/polymarketLiveWs/clobWs: stale socket guards on all 4 WS streams
- dataFetcher: validate cachedDecimals against NaN and range 0-32
- mlLoader: guard metrics.accuracy != null before logging

High:
- guards: remove dead code \(always-null price assignment\)
- tradeFilters: use Number.isFinite\(\) for mlConfidence weekend check
- positionTracker: validate setBankroll rejects negative/NaN
- featureExtract: guard price>0 before delta/price division

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Restore v5 ML model \(59.87% acc\) + choppy→moderate compat fix

V6 model \(63.93%\) was lost due to training regression. Restored v5 from
commit c9a2164 \(491 trees, AUC 0.64, Platt calibrated\). Added choppy→moderate
regime remap in featureExtract.js since v5 was trained with 0% choppy
\(countVwapCrosses bug\). Live choppy regime now safely mapped to moderate
for ML inference without affecting UI or edge engine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix bugs from full codebase audit \(10 fixes across 14 files\)

Critical/High:
- featureExtract: fix MACD field names \(histogram→hist, macd→line\) so ML gets real values
- featureExtract: add regimeConfidence pass-through, remap choppy→moderate, clamp ruleProbUp
- featureMap: rename regime_choppy→regime_confidence, funding→volume_acceleration/bb_squeeze
- computeIndicators: use Wilder-smoothed RSI \(series last value\) to fix train-serve skew
- EdgePanel: fix crash when edge is undefined \(!== null → != null\)
- useMarketData: pass regimeConfidence to ML, remove unused funding params

Medium:
- 6 TA components: add null guards on .toFixed\(\) calls \(AtrRow, BollingerRow, EmaCrossRow, FundingRateRow, StochRsiRow, VolumeDeltaRow\)
- computeIndicators: fix volumeAvg divisor for <120 candles \(hardcoded /6 → dynamic\)
- binance.js: add 10s timeout to HTTP fetches \(prevents indefinite hangs\)
- chainlinkRpc: set cachedFetchedAtMs before fetch so failures respect cooldown

Low:
- atr.js: remove dead smoothedAtr duplicate code, fix stale reference in return

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
